Management of modal windows in a UI, including priorities, visibility, focus, and transitions.


## Files
- **[modal_manager.c](modal_manager.c.md)**: Manages modal windows in a UI, handling their priorities, visibility, focus, and transitions.
- **[modal_manager.h](modal_manager.h.md)**: Manages modal windows with priority levels, properties, and functions for initialization, rendering, and event handling.
- **[modal_manager_private.h](modal_manager_private.h.md)**: Header file with licensing information and a pragma once directive for modal management.
